subject: Ops note: parrot deployment schedule for Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-4957
body: Here is a progress summary for the parrot plan in Canberra. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-4957. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
